first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify the same core issue: a lack of recent, relevant C++ and industrial automation experience. The minor differences in wording are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any change in logic or introduction of new, unsupported claims tied to the demographic change.
